texto: I never fell in love with another woman. I cannot have a relationship with a woman if I'm not in love...I'm a very particular person, I'm not very much interested in short adventures with women or girls. I have to fall in love with someone in order to have a realtionship with her.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Omar Sharif sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “I never fell in love with another woman. I cannot have a relationship with a woman if I'm not in …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, love, relationship, útil em momentos de relationship e woman.

texto: I'm very wary about giving advice. I think it's very dangerous to give advice to people, except if you know them very well.

texto: The reason it has relevance is because I, as a popular Arab personality - the Arab people like me and respect me - thought it was time for me to make an ever so tiny statement about what I thought about this whole thing.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Omar Sharif: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “The reason it has relevance is because I, as a popular Arab personality - the Arab people like me…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, time, personality pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de personality e me.
